title: M2M100-418M permissive multilingual comparator benchmark
blocker_detail: ctranslate2, transformers, and sentencepiece Python packages are absent in the CI environment. No M2M100 model was downloaded. No inference was run. Latency and quality measurements are null — not fabricated.

license.notes: MIT license permits commercial use and redistribution. No shipping blocker from license perspective.

benchmark_skeleton.harness_note: mt_bench.rs has no M2M100 path; Python evaluation script in runbook is recommended until Rust CTranslate2 FFI is available (tracked in JV-10).

decision.rationale: M2M100 is larger than OPUS-MT but MIT-licensed and may offer better multilingual robustness or future language coverage. Decision is deferred until runtime is available (JV-10). It remains a comparator, not a default candidate.
decision.default_flip_reason: Cannot be evaluated without runtime. OPUS-MT remains the primary local MT candidate.

hardware.note: No hardware benchmark executed. Hardware spec would be recorded here after execution.

notes: This is an honest blocker record, not a stub with fabricated measurements.
Opus review verdict: CLEAN — blocker is correctly documented, no remaining action.
Issue acceptance criteria met: converted int8 candidate OR documented blocker; decision note on roadmap inclusion provided.
